sections.name: Officium
lines: St. Sixtus II, Pope, and Companions, Martyrs

sections.name: Oratio
lines: O God, Who permits us to celebrate the anniversary of the death of Your holy Martyrs, Saints Sixtus, Felicissimus and Agapitus, grant that we may enjoy their companionship in everlasting happiness.

sections.name: Postcommunio
lines: Grant, we beseech You, O almighty and merciful God, that through the intercession of Your holy Martyrs, Sixtus, Felicissimus, and Agapitus, what we take into our mouths we may eat with pure heart.
